{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Reigan Shen's anchor
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses an anchor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
